title: userns: add arbitrary steps/stage to `--userns=auto` test
body: Support for build with `--userns=auto` was added here https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4064 but it never tested a build where multiple ephemeral containers were used. So just add arbitrary steps and stages to the exisitng `--userns=auto` test to make sure build still works fine.

comments.body: @rhatdan @nalind @giuseppe PTAL just extending test since something for mult-stage and step with `--userns=auto` was reported to me yesterday.
